prompt: Description: A summer travel snapshot of a young East Asian woman in her early twenties by a countryside road, possessing a light, soft, and slightly girlish aura, with long dark brown hair in low twin tails, a small face, and clean features. The overall first impression is fresh, relaxed, and a daily snapshot with a retro CCD photography feel. The subject is a young woman standing at the edge of the road, leaning towards the right of the frame, head tilted slightly to the left, facing the camera with a quiet and direct gaze. Her expression is a slight smile, naturally relaxed, not a staged commercial look. Her dark brown hair is in low twin tails, slightly messy from the wind with thin bangs and loose strands near her cheeks, and light pink hair accessories. Makeup is very light, skin is pale with slight overexposure and a pinkish hue under strong sunlight, retaining real skin texture. She wears a white sleeveless high-neck loose dress or long top made of thin cotton fabric with natural folds, connected to a fluffy white long skirt. The clothing appears largely white due to sunlight with some detail loss. She carries a small white shoulder bag, right hand near the bottom edge, body oriented towards the camera but with a shifted center of gravity. Background environment is an outdoor countryside road in a sunny summer afternoon with a large blue sky and thin white clouds. She stands on the right edge of an asphalt road stretching into the distance with a yellow center line, silver guardrails, and white streetlights creating depth. To the left are grass, concrete boundaries, and a gray utility pole with wires crossing above. A triangular traffic sign is behind her. Faraway hills, fields, and trees are present. The background is clear but slightly blurred due to old digital camera quality. Mood is a mix of summer, freshness, countryside travel, Japanese photography style, and millennial retro snapshot. The image has an imperfect but authentic relaxed vibe. Photography and Image Quality: Shot with an older CCD digital camera or early consumer point-and-shoot, showing low-pixel output effects, limited resolution, slight blurring, insufficient edge sharpness, and sensor noise/compression artifacts. The lens may be a small-sensor wide-angle lens. Lighting is hard sunlight from a high right angle, causing overexposure on white clothes and skin. Colors feature cyan-blue skies, slightly gray-green vegetation, and cool-white dresses. Composition: Vertical 3:4 portrait, capturing from head to skirt hem. The camera is at eye level or slightly low, slightly tilted for a casual snapshot feel. Triangular traffic signs, utility poles, and streetlights provide geometric and depth elements. Aspect Ratio: 3:4
